commands.summary: 101 tests passed with 2 documented formal-model skips. Coverage includes missing/stale dashboard rejection, stable rendering, doctor repair, bootstrap, adoption, new-record stamping, import, takeover, and conformance materialization.
The upstream repository passed governance validation with its canonical dashboard.
Published implementation commit 126264a1dcd20699063bf4163413ccfab574b6bc to ForgeWireLabs/repopact main.
The pinned adopter rejected its historically stale dashboard with the canonical regeneration instruction.
Canonical regeneration restored a passing ForgeLink audit and reported 5 active, 3 deferred, and 26 completed items.
ForgeLink commit 02d0083 pinned RepoPact 126264a; its pre-push gate passed governance plus 221 renderer tests and 202 of 203 Node tests with one opt-in live Twilio test skipped.
